message:
feat(daemon): add scan timeout tracking and fix circuit breaker backoff log ordering

Two operational improvements to the monitoring daemon:

1. Scan timeout observability: Add `timed_out: bool` field to the
   `WorkerReport::ScanCompleted` variant so the scanner thread can
   report whether a filesystem scan exceeded its deadline. The daemon
   now increments `summary_scan_timeouts` when this flag is set,
   providing visibility into scan timeout frequency in summary stats.

2. Circuit breaker backoff ordering fix: Move the exponential backoff
   doubling (`circuit_breaker_cooldown * 2`) in `executor_thread_main`
   to execute BEFORE the log message that reports the cooldown value.
   Previously the log was emitted with the pre-doubled cooldown, then
   the cooldown was doubled — meaning the logged value did not match
   the actually-enforced cooldown duration. The fix ensures the logged
   value accurately reflects what will be enforced on the next cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
